changelog.title: Task categories, email page, weather, auto-update
changes: Task categories: Work, Personal, School, Travel, Health, Finance
Email page: inbox, sent, compose, reply, delete
Weather widget on dashboard with inline city change
Self-update from Settings — no terminal needed
Global search across tasks, calendar, notes, memories
Calendar week view with manual event management
Isolated workspace per instance for multi-user VMs

changelog.title: Initial release
changes: Task management with priorities and due dates
Daily backups, cost tracking, prompt optimizer
